CREATE INDEX idx_user_interests_user_category ON public.user_interests USING btree (user_id, category_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_user_interests_user_uuid_category_unique ON public.user_interests USING btree (user_id_uuid, category_id) WHERE (user_id_uuid IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_interests_pkey ON public.user_interests USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_interests_user_category_unique ON public.user_interests USING btree (user_id, category_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_user_negative_signals_user_article ON public.user_negative_signals USING btree (user_id, article_id) WHERE (article_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_user_negative_signals_user_category ON public.user_negative_signals USING btree (user_id, category_id) WHERE (category_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE INDEX idx_user_negative_signals_user_created ON public.user_negative_signals USING btree (user_id, created_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_user_negative_signals_user_source ON public.user_negative_signals USING btree (user_id, source_id) WHERE (source_id IS NOT NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_negative_signals_pkey ON public.user_negative_signals USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_preferences_pkey ON public.user_preferences USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_preferences_user_id_key ON public.user_preferences USING btree (user_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_user_read_history_article_read_at ON public.user_read_history USING btree (article_id, read_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_user_read_history_user_read_at ON public.user_read_history USING btree (user_id, read_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_read_history_pkey ON public.user_read_history USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_read_history_user_id_article_id_key ON public.user_read_history USING btree (user_id, article_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_rewards_pkey ON public.user_rewards USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_rewards_user_id_key ON public.user_rewards USING btree (user_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_user_source_affinity_source_score ON public.user_source_affinity USING btree (source_id, score DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_user_source_affinity_user_score ON public.user_source_affinity USING btree (user_id, score DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_source_affinity_pkey ON public.user_source_affinity USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_source_affinity_user_id_source_id_key ON public.user_source_affinity USING btree (user_id, source_id)
CREATE INDEX user_suspensions_active_idx ON public.user_suspensions USING btree (user_id, ends_at) WHERE (lifted_at IS NULL)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX user_suspensions_pkey ON public.user_suspensions USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX user_suspensions_user_idx ON public.user_suspensions USING btree (user_id, starts_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX verifications_pkey ON public.verifications USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX verifications_status_idx ON public.verifications USING btree (status, requested_at)
CREATE INDEX verifications_user_idx ON public.verifications USING btree (user_id, requested_at DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_worker_heartbeats_type_status ON public.worker_heartbeats USING btree (worker_type, status, last_heartbeat_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX worker_heartbeats_pkey ON public.worker_heartbeats USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX worker_heartbeats_worker_id_worker_type_key ON public.worker_heartbeats USING btree (worker_id, worker_type)

with_check: ((auth.uid() IS NULL) AND (device_id IS NOT NULL) AND (user_id IS NOT NULL))
((auth.role() = 'service_role'::text) OR ((auth.uid() IS NOT NULL) AND (reporter_id = auth.uid())))
(((auth.uid() IS NOT NULL) AND (user_id = auth.uid())) OR (auth.role() = 'service_role'::text))
